utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven of these categories. Each one appears to be fully specified with the details requested: destinations are clearly listed, travel dates provided, transportation includes flight details and costs, accommodation includes hotel names and costs, activities include names and costs, additional_services includes insurance information, and total_budget gives a complete cost breakdown for each option. Therefore, all seven required items are covered and fully specified.

The activities in Budapest include Rock Climbing (rating 10), Caving Adventure (no direct listing, closest is adventurous physical activity but not listed — omit rating linkage), Kayaking (rating 9), and Cycling Adventure (rating 9).
